Add Contact to Campaign.description: Adds an existing contact to an existing campaign.

Add File to Record.description: Adds an existing file to an existing Record.

Create Record.description: Creates a new record of a specified Salesforce object.

Send Email.description: Sends an email using Salesforce Simple Email Actions.

Update Record.description: Updates an existing record of a specified Salesforce object.

Execute SOQL Query.description: Custom SOQL SELECT queries with aggregate function support.

Execute SOSL Search.description: Custom SOSL queries for text-based searches across multiple objects.

Find Child Records.description: Finds Child Records for a given Parent ID.

Find Record.description: Finds a record by up to two fields and values.

Find Record (SOQL).description: Finds a record using a SOQL WHERE clause.

Find Records (Line Items).description: Finds records by a field and value (with line-item support).

Find Records (SOQL).description: Finds one or more records using a SOQL WHERE clause (with line item support).

Get Notes and Attachments.description: Gets all notes and attachments for a record.
